meta.title: mappy — offline maps for explorers and game masters
meta.description: mappy — offline-first interactive maps for open-world games, homebrew campaigns, and realms you drew yourself. Windows desktop, no account, no telemetry.
meta.ogDescription: MapLibre canvas, markers, lore, progress, measure tools, Marker Maker, Tile Studio, and Official Map Packs — all on your PC.

body:
Offline-first · Windows · No account · No telemetry

Some maps are printed on paper.
Yours remembers. (❁´◡`❁)

I'm Rowan at the guild door — and mappy is the cartographer's table for open-world games, homebrew campaigns, and realms you drew yourself. MapLibre canvas, marker corpus, unified search, progress tracking, measure tools, territories, Whiteboard pins, Marker Maker, Tile Studio, and Official Map Packs — static files on your machine, not our servers.

Get mappy for Windows Feature wiki Full player guide

The installer ships a demo realm so you can learn every instrument before downloading a full game world. Updates arrive through the in-app updater . o(≧▽≦)o

A look at the table

Peer through the guild window

Explore, author, and search from one cartographer's table.

Explore ╰(*°▽°*)╯

Pan a living MapLibre canvas — categories, regions, lore hover cards , unified search, and progress filters. Everything loads locally after the first fetch.

Author ༼ つ ◕_◕ ༽つ

Draw paths and territories, place landmarks and whiteboard pins, run Marker Maker and Tile Studio, then export .mappy or .mappymap bundles you control.

Trust ^_^

No account. No product analytics Progress, drawings, shortcuts, and HUD layout stay on your PC — we do not host your atlas.

84 instruments in 15 chapters o(≧▽≦)o — pick a chapter, search by name, or expand one drawer at a time.

Guild favorites (^▽^)

8 high-impact instruments — full game worlds, unified search, marker media, drawn routes, homebrew map images, session scratch pins, and a portable . mappy vault on your PC.

Official Map Packs\(^o^)/

Full game worlds download inside the app — e.g. free Crimson Desert — not stuffed into the installer.

Unified top-bar search(●'◡'●)

One search field for markers, lore, zones, routes, scratch pins, and landmarks.

Attach media to markers(◠‿◠)

Hang screenshots, reference art, or field photos on markers you author — not just text lore.

Marker media annotations(⌒‿⌒)

Draw on marker photos with pen and eraser — circles, arrows, session notes — and save annotations with the image on your PC.

User-drawn paths(◕‿◕)

Sketch persistent roads and routes; read segment and total length.

Bring your own map image(*^▽^*)

Import Wonderdraft exports, Photoshop slices, or photos of hand-drawn maps.

Whiteboard pinsヽ(•‿•)ノ

scratch pins stored only locally, drawn above official bundle pins.

Export map state mappy file(^_^)/

Save progress, drawings, and layout to a .mappy file you control.

The full grimoire

Every instrument, chapter by chapter

Same friendly syntax as in-app search: "exact phrase" · spaces = every word (AND) · | = either (OR) · prefix* wildcard search syntax

No instruments matched. Try fewer words, media | attach, or a prefix like annot*.

⬇

5Install and updates( ^_^)/

Setup, demo realm, Official Map Packs, and the updater — the guild door before your first expedition.

Headline instrument

Windows Setup (NSIS)

(◍•ᴗ•◍)
What it is
Download Setup from https://short.army/mappy — the only installer we ship for players. Run it, launch from Start, and you are at the table.
How to use it
Bookmark short.army/mappy — it always points at the latest Windows build.
Tips
Updates arrive through the in-app updater; you should not need a fresh installer for every patch.
  • Auto-update (✿◠‿◠) Signed in-app updater on Windows keeps mappy current without hunting downloads. UnfoldFold

    Signed in-app updater on Windows keeps mappy current without hunting downloads.

    How
    Just accept updates when the app prompts you.
    Tips
    If an update fails, grab a fresh Setup from short.army/mappy.
  • Demo realm ( ˘▽˘)/ The installer includes a white-label demo world so you can learn every instrument before do… UnfoldFold

    The installer includes a white-label demo world so you can learn every instrument before downloading a full game map.

    How
    Launch and explore — categories, search, drawing tools all work on the demo.
    Tips
    Treat the demo as tutorial parchment, not your campaign canon.
  • Official Map Packs ( °▽°)/ Full game worlds download inside the app — e.g. free Crimson Desert — not stuffed into the … UnfoldFold

    Full game worlds download inside the app — e.g. free Crimson Desert — not stuffed into the installer.

    How
    File → Official maps → pick a pack → wait for offline install.
    Tips
    Third-party world data belongs to its publishers; mappy is the table you set the map on.
  • Free to use (≧◡≦) No subscription. The app is free; contact copy clarifies software vs game data licensing. UnfoldFold

    No subscription. The app is free; contact copy clarifies software vs game data licensing.

    How
    Play. No account gate.
    Tips
    Commercial questions are about software licensing, not buying map data bundles.
⌖

14Map canvas and navigation(◕ᗜ◕)

The living table: pan, filter, and read the realm without asking our servers.

Headline instrument

Interactive map

(｡♥‿♥｡)
What it is
Living canvas that loads structured marker bundles — categories, regions, locations, and world config.
How to use it
Pan and zoom; click markers; use the legend in the Markers dock.
Tips
Performance stays local — no server round-trip for marker data after load.
  • Map profiles (◕▿◕) Switch between demo realm, installed Official Maps, and custom tile maps you authored. UnfoldFold

    Switch between demo realm, installed Official Maps, and custom tile maps you authored.

    How
    Use profile picker in the shell; each profile remembers its own layout prefs.
    Tips
    Install packs before expecting game worlds in the list.
  • Pan and zoom ٩(◕‿◕)۶ Standard map navigation with category markers and region washes painted on the canvas. UnfoldFold

    Standard map navigation with category markers and region washes painted on the canvas.

    How
    Drag to pan; scroll or pinch to zoom.
    Tips
    Collapse the legend when you need a clean screenshot for your party.
  • Hover coordinates (｡◕‿◕｡) Map-plane coordinates under your pointer show on the glass strip while you hover. UnfoldFold

    Map-plane coordinates under your pointer show on the glass strip while you hover.

    How
    Move the mouse over the map; read lng/lat (chart units) on the HUD strip.
    Tips
    Useful for sharing meeting points with friends outside the app.
  • Coordinate display scale (｡◕‿‿◕｡) Worlds may expose readable chart units or optional real-world distance multipliers. UnfoldFold

    Worlds may expose readable chart units or optional real-world distance multipliers.

    How
    Check the measure HUD and coordinate strip — units follow the active profile config.
    Tips
    Override scale in profile settings when the bundle supports it.
  • Fantasy parchment basemap (^_^)v Demo and authoring worlds can use a tone paper background instead of satellite-style tiles. UnfoldFold

    Demo and authoring worlds can use a tone paper background instead of satellite-style tiles.

    How
    Explore the demo — you will see parchment rather than Earth geography.
    Tips
    Great for tabletop-style realms that are not lat/long real places.
  • Grid overlay ╰(*°▽°*)╯ Toggle a grid from the Tools menu to align placements and battlemaps. UnfoldFold

    Toggle a grid from the Tools menu to align placements and battlemaps.

    How
    Tools menu → grid toggle.
    Tips
    Fine grid respects how far zoomed in you are — it will not clutter the whole world at once.
  • Region chips (♡´▽`♡) Filter which markers appear by official or custom regions. UnfoldFold

    Filter which markers appear by official or custom regions.

    How
    Click region chips above the map or in the Markers dock.
    Tips
    Combine with category visibility for surgical filtering.
  • Category legend (◕‿◕)♡ Grouped categories with collected-vs-total counts; expand and collapse groups. UnfoldFold

    Grouped categories with collected-vs-total counts; expand and collapse groups.

    How
    Open the Markers dock; use checkboxes and disclosure triangles.
    Tips
    Your expand/collapse choices persist per profile across sessions.
  • Category visibility (っ◕‿◕)っ Show or hide whole marker categories without reloading the world. UnfoldFold

    Show or hide whole marker categories without reloading the world.

    How
    Toggle category checkboxes in the legend.
    Tips
    Hide spoilers or clutter during a focused hunt.
  • Legend hover preview (っ´ω`)っ Hover a category row to fly or fit the map to those markers. UnfoldFold

    Hover a category row to fly or fit the map to those markers.

    How
    Hover the category name in the legend briefly.
    Tips
    Debounced — pause a beat so accidental hovers do not yeet the camera.
  • Sprite and glyph pins (づ｡◕‿‿◕｡)づ Markers show category icons from spritesheets or deterministic glyphs on coloured circles. UnfoldFold

    Markers show category icons from spritesheets or deterministic glyphs on coloured circles.

    How
    Zoom in — icons become clearer; offline bundles include fallback glyphs.
    Tips
    If sprites fail to load, circles plus glyphs still identify categories.
  • Pin size and opacity (づ￣ ³￣)づ Scale and fade bundled markers and Whiteboard pins together. UnfoldFold

    Scale and fade bundled markers and Whiteboard pins together.

    How
    Markers dock → pin size and opacity sliders.
    Tips
    Dial down opacity when scratch pins and official pins overlap.
  • Accent theming ( ˘ ³˘)♥ Some worlds tint HUD accents from bundle style hints. UnfoldFold

    Some worlds tint HUD accents from bundle style hints.

    How
    Switch profiles and notice panel accents shift with the world.
    Tips
    White-label demo uses a neutral palette by design.
⌕

7Search and discovery(◍•ᴗ•◍)♡

Hunt by name, lore quote, or landmark — one search field for the whole atlas.

Headline instrument

Unified top-bar search

(o´ω`o)
What it is
One search field for markers, lore, zones, routes, scratch pins, and landmarks.
How to use it
Click search → type → pick a result.
Tips
Combine with progress filters when mopping up completion.
  • Lore in search ( ˘ω˘)♡ Story text stored in marker lore fields matches search — not just titles. UnfoldFold

    Story text stored in marker lore fields matches search — not just titles.

    How
    Search a quote you remember from a lore blurb.
    Tips
    Write lore in markers you author — future you will thank present you.
  • Marker detail (❁´◡`❁) Full panel with lore, description, media gallery, and provenance when shipped. UnfoldFold

    Full panel with lore, description, media gallery, and provenance when shipped.

    How
    Click a marker on map or list.
    Tips
    Provenance links show where enrichment came from when publishers provide it.
  • Marker media annotations (✿╹◡╹) Draw on marker photos with pen and eraser — circles, arrows, session notes — and save annot… UnfoldFold

    Draw on marker photos with pen and eraser — circles, arrows, session notes — and save annotations with the image on your PC.

    How
    Open marker → media gallery → open image viewer → annotate → Save annotations.
    Tips
    Undo/redo before you save; perfect for party handouts and GM prep.
  • Attach media to markers (´｡• ω •｡`) Hang screenshots, reference art, or field photos on markers you author — not just text lore. UnfoldFold

    Hang screenshots, reference art, or field photos on markers you author — not just text lore.

    How
    Marker Maker → edit marker → attach media, or enrich from marker detail when authoring.
    Tips
    Filter the Marker Maker list by with/without media when cleaning a large corpus.
  • Rich hover cards (◕ω◕) Hover a marker for title plus formatted lore preview on the map. UnfoldFold

    Hover a marker for title plus formatted lore preview on the map.

    How
    Pause over a pin briefly.
    Tips
    Great for quick reminders without opening the full panel.
  • Quick jump and multi-picker (•ω•) Dialogs to jump to coordinates or pick many items at once. UnfoldFold

    Dialogs to jump to coordinates or pick many items at once.

    How
    Open from menu or HUD actions when offered.
    Tips
    Use before a session to select a working set of pins.
☑

7Progress and quest log(´• ω •`)

Tick caves, herbs, and bosses; filter what is left like a proper quest board.

Headline instrument

Mark complete

(•̀ᴗ•́)و
What it is
Tick locations complete — caves cleared, herbs gathered, bosses down.
How to use it
Open marker → check complete.
Tips
Progress saves locally on your PC.
  • Visited and collected (*´∀`*) Map halos and checklist stay aligned when you mark progress. UnfoldFold

    Map halos and checklist stay aligned when you mark progress.

    How
    Mark complete on any eligible marker.
    Tips
    Filter the map to see only what is left.
  • Progress filters (*´▽`*) Show visited, gathered, or ready-to-regather modes on the canvas. UnfoldFold

    Show visited, gathered, or ready-to-regather modes on the canvas.

    How
    Progress dock → pick a mode → Show on map.
    Tips
    Headline text tells you exactly what is visible.
  • Per-category language ( ˘ω˘ ) Completion verbs match the world — cleared vs gathered vs found. UnfoldFold

    Completion verbs match the world — cleared vs gathered vs found.

    How
    Read category labels in the legend.
    Tips
    Official packs define semantics; mappy respects them.
  • Gathering log (｡>‿‿<｡) Table of completions with phase filters, search, and category chips. UnfoldFold

    Table of completions with phase filters, search, and category chips.

    How
    Open Progress dock → gathering log section.
    Tips
    Search by title when you forget the zone name.
  • Regather timers (❀╹◡╹) Resource pins can show cooldown until they can be gathered again. UnfoldFold

    Resource pins can show cooldown until they can be gathered again.

    How
    Configure respawn intervals in settings when the world supports gatherables.
    Tips
    Pair with progress filter ready-to-regather.
  • Checklist panel (｡•̀ᴗ-)✧ Browse and filter completion state across categories. UnfoldFold

    Browse and filter completion state across categories.

    How
    Progress dock → checklist views.
    Tips
    Use before ending a session to see stragglers.
⟷

5Measure and routes(=^･ω･^=)

Rulers, paths, and routes for meeting friends or planning a march.

Headline instrument

Measure HUD

ʕºᴥºʔ
What it is
Ruler mode with distances in map-plane units; optional metres or kilometres.
How to use it
Enter measure mode from toolbar or menu.
Tips
Set real-world scale in profile settings when the bundle provides it.
  • User-drawn paths (=^‥^=) Sketch persistent roads and routes; read segment and total length. UnfoldFold

    Sketch persistent roads and routes; read segment and total length.

    How
    Author mode → draw path → finish line.
    Tips
    Paths stay in local storage — back up before OS reinstall.
  • Path draft undo and redo (=^_^=) While sketching, undo mistaken vertices before you commit the path. UnfoldFold

    While sketching, undo mistaken vertices before you commit the path.

    How
    Use undo/redo while drawing; finish when satisfied.
    Tips
    Stacks reset when you start a new draft.
  • Route guide ʕ•ᴥ•ʔ Measure along saved paths; falls back to straight line when roads do not connect. UnfoldFold

    Measure along saved paths; falls back to straight line when roads do not connect.

    How
    Measure HUD → route guide; pick points near saved geometry.
    Tips
    Draw paths first for accurate travel distances.
  • Author mode (ᵔᴥᵔ) Toolbar layout that foregrounds drawing tools over pure exploration. UnfoldFold

    Toolbar layout that foregrounds drawing tools over pure exploration.

    How
    Toggle Author in the navbar; persists per profile.
    Tips
    Switch back to Explore when you are done sketching.
▣

3Territories and zones(≧∇≦)/

Paint regions and zones — who holds which slice of the map.

Headline instrument

Custom territories

(•̀o•́)ง
What it is
Draw polygon zones; they appear as filter chips and narrow visible markers.
How to use it
Author mode → sketch territory → name it.
Tips
Use for party agreements like this valley is session two.
  • Official region overrides ヽ(´▽`)/ Redraw a client-side outline for an official region without changing bundle ids. UnfoldFold

    Redraw a client-side outline for an official region without changing bundle ids.

    How
    Select region → redraw outline flow when profile allows.
    Tips
    Marker region_ids in data stay canonical — only the painted outline changes locally.
  • Zone polygon visibility (ง •̀_•́)ง Toggle individual zone polygons on or off on the map. UnfoldFold

    Toggle individual zone polygons on or off on the map.

    How
    Zones dock or view controls per world.
    Tips
    Hide noisy borders during exploration.
✎

5Whiteboard and scene layersლ(╹◡╹ლ)

scratch pins and scene notes that stay on your machine, not ours.

Headline instrument

Whiteboard pins

(≧◡≦) ♡
What it is
scratch pins stored only locally, drawn above official bundle pins.
How to use it
Whiteboard panel → place at click or coordinates.
Tips
Perfect for session notes that should not edit the official pack.
  • Whiteboard panel (つ≧▽≦)つ List, edit, fly-to, and delete scratch pins. UnfoldFold

    List, edit, fly-to, and delete scratch pins.

    How
    View → Whiteboard dock.
    Tips
    Negative ids on the map layer keep scratch pins separate from lore markers.
  • Scene overlays ☜(⌒▽⌒)☞ Stretch battlemap images (SVG, PNG, JPEG, WebP) over the viewport. UnfoldFold

    Stretch battlemap images (SVG, PNG, JPEG, WebP) over the viewport.

    How
    Scene dock → add image → adjust bounds.
    Tips
    Authoring profiles only — not shipped for finished player-only worlds.
  • Dungeon presets \(•◡•)/ Bundled CC0 grid and sketch presets for quick battlemap alignment. UnfoldFold

    Bundled CC0 grid and sketch presets for quick battlemap alignment.

    How
    Scene dock → pick a preset when available.
    Tips
    Upload your own art when presets do not fit.
  • Scene HUD dock (ᕗ ◕_◕)ᕗ Toggle scene layer UI from View menu on supported profiles. UnfoldFold

    Toggle scene layer UI from View menu on supported profiles.

    How
    View → Scene layers.
    Tips
    Pair with grid overlay for tactical grids.
⚑

3Landmarks and tools menu(*>ω<*)

Landmarks, grids, and the Tools menu — the pocket compass on the glass.

Headline instrument

Landmarks

¯\_(ツ)_/¯
What it is
Typed pins dropped from the map context menu.
How to use it
Right-click map → add landmark → pick type.
Tips
Landmarks appear in search alongside bundle markers.
  • Landmark panel and palette ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) Manage landmark categories and placement tools. UnfoldFold

    Manage landmark categories and placement tools.

    How
    Open landmark panel from HUD when mounted.
    Tips
    Use for repeated POI types in homebrew campaigns.
  • Tools menu (⌐■_■) Grid and related map instruments in one dropdown. UnfoldFold

    Grid and related map instruments in one dropdown.

    How
    Menubar → Tools.
    Tips
    Grid is the headline tool — more may appear as worlds evolve.
✦

4Marker Maker(^_-)☆

Author categories, icons, and lore — then export a bundle you own.

Headline instrument

Marker Maker workshop window

(☞ ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)☞
What it is
Separate window for category CRUD — icons, colours, labels.
How to use it
Toolbar → Marker Maker.
Tips
Keep it open on a second monitor during prep sessions.
  • Override bundled pins (◕‿-) User categories merge with official data without corrupting the pack. UnfoldFold

    User categories merge with official data without corrupting the pack.

    How
    Create categories in Marker Maker; they appear in legend.
    Tips
    Export before risky experiments.
  • Marker Maker export (^.~)☆ Share marker changes or merged bundles with your party. UnfoldFold

    Share marker changes or merged bundles with your party.

    How
    Marker Maker → export flow.
    Tips
    Treat exports like any file you would send to friends.
  • Marker Maker navigation ( •_•)>⌐■-■ Breadcrumbs and deep edit UI inside the workshop. UnfoldFold

    Breadcrumbs and deep edit UI inside the workshop.

    How
    Follow breadcrumbs when editing nested category trees.
    Tips
    Large worlds benefit from disciplined category naming.
▦

2Tile Studio(´･ω･`)?

Bake tiles for custom profiles; same static-file discipline as everything else.

Headline instrument

Bring your own map image

(o_O)
What it is
Import Wonderdraft exports, Photoshop slices, or photos of hand-drawn maps.
How to use it
Tile Studio from toolbar → load image → calibrate bounds.
Tips
Calibrate corners carefully — measure tools inherit your bounds.
  • User-tiles profile (°o°) Custom raster map becomes a selectable profile like official worlds. UnfoldFold

    Custom raster map becomes a selectable profile like official worlds.

    How
    Finish Tile Studio setup → switch profile.
    Tips
    Huge images may take a moment to cache — patience, cartographer.
⎘

5File menu save and share(O_o)

Save, import, export — .mappy and .mappymap under your control.

Headline instrument

Export map state mappy file

(´-ω-`)
What it is
Save progress, drawings, and layout to a .mappy file you control.
How to use it
File → Export map state.
Tips
Before Windows reinstall — export first.
  • Import map bundle mappymap ( °△°) Encrypted self-contained bundles from someone you trust. UnfoldFold

    Encrypted self-contained bundles from someone you trust.

    How
    File → Import map bundle.
    Tips
    Only import bundles from people you trust — they are full world packages.
  • Backup and restore (⊙_⊙) Snapshot map state before a big session. UnfoldFold

    Snapshot map state before a big session.

    How
    File menu backup/restore rows.
    Tips
    Restore is your undo button for catastrophic mistakes.
  • Official maps dialog Σ(°△°) Browse and install Official Map Packs from the live catalog. UnfoldFold

    Browse and install Official Map Packs from the live catalog.

    How
    File → Official maps.
    Tips
    Needs network once per pack; then offline.
  • Layout reset (・・? Restore default HUD dock arrangement. UnfoldFold

    Restore default HUD dock arrangement.

    How
    File → reset layout when offered.
    Tips
    Use when a dock wandered off-screen after resolution change.
▤

10HUD view and layout(U_U)

Docks, shortcuts, and layout prefs that remember how you like the table set.

Headline instrument

Draggable docks

(T_T)
What it is
Zones, Markers, Progress, Whiteboard, Scene — float and drag inside the viewport.
How to use it
Grab dock title bar → drag; release inside window.
Tips
Docks clamp so you cannot lose them entirely off-screen.
  • View menu (´･_･`) Show or hide docks and marker detail panel. UnfoldFold

    Show or hide docks and marker detail panel.

    How
    Menubar → View → toggle rows.
    Tips
    Hide docks you do not need this session.
  • Collapse docks (-_-)zzz Collapse to a slim title strip without removing the dock. UnfoldFold

    Collapse to a slim title strip without removing the dock.

    How
    Dock header collapse control.
    Tips
    Collapsed state persists separately from hidden.
  • Layout persistence (´ω`) Dock positions and collapse state save per profile locally. UnfoldFold

    Dock positions and collapse state save per profile locally.

    How
    Arrange once; reload — layout returns.
    Tips
    Reset layout if things feel chaotic.
  • Drag confirmation bar (´∀`)♡ Confirm or reset when moving user-placed markers. UnfoldFold

    Confirm or reset when moving user-placed markers.

    How
    Drag a movable pin → bar appears → Confirm or Reset.
    Tips
    Enter confirms; Escape resets — same as buttons.
  • App settings dialog (°o°!) Respawn timers, keyboard shortcuts, unified dialog host. UnfoldFold

    Respawn timers, keyboard shortcuts, unified dialog host.

    How
    Gear icon or File → settings paths.
    Tips
    Desktop shortcut editor dims actions that need the installed app.
  • Contact dialog Σ(°△°;) Reach the team from inside the app. UnfoldFold

    Reach the team from inside the app.

    How
    Toolbar contact or File menu.
    Tips
    Questions about licensing vs game data welcome.
  • Desktop menubar (゜o゜) File, Chart, Links, View, Tools — full desktop menubar. UnfoldFold

    File, Chart, Links, View, Tools — full desktop menubar.

    How
    Explore menus when you forget where an action lives.
    Tips
    Mentor tooltips on dotted underlines explain obscure rows.
  • Context menu (°ロ°) Right-click the map for placement and landmark actions. UnfoldFold

    Right-click the map for placement and landmark actions.

    How
    Right-click canvas.
    Tips
    Context varies slightly by profile capabilities.
  • Pin settings popover щ(゜ロ゜щ) Per-pin options from the map or list. UnfoldFold

    Per-pin options from the map or list.

    How
    Click pin settings when available on a marker.
    Tips
    Useful for user-authored pins.
⚙

3Settings and shortcuts(;_;)

Language, keys, and menus — make the app speak your tongue.

Headline instrument

Respawn timer settings

(>_<)
What it is
Tune how long until resource pins can be gathered again.
How to use it
Settings → respawn timer fields → Save.
Tips
Summary text under the field explains the interval in plain language.
  • Keyboard shortcut editor (╥_╥) Rebind File menu actions; save overrides locally on desktop. UnfoldFold

    Rebind File menu actions; save overrides locally on desktop.

    How
    Settings → keyboard shortcuts → record chord → Save.
    Tips
    Conflicts reported while you record — pick another chord.
  • Shortcut conflict reporting (´;ω;`) Immediate feedback if a chord is already bound. UnfoldFold

    Immediate feedback if a chord is already bound.

    How
    Watch for conflict message while recording.
    Tips
    Reset individual rows if you make a mess.
文

4Localization(•_•)

Eleven UI languages plus per-pack world tongues when publishers ship them.

Headline instrument

Eleven UI locales

♪(´ε`)
What it is
The whole interface — menus, docks, settings, mentor tooltips — ships in English plus ten translations.
How to use it
Open App settings → Language → pick your locale → Save. The app reloads once so every panel picks up the new tongue.
Tips
Your choice is remembered on this PC. Official Map Pack marker text follows the pack, not this setting.
  • Language picker (^_-) Native labels in the dropdown: English, Español, 简体中文, Français, Deutsch, 日本語, Português, Р… UnfoldFold

    Native labels in the dropdown: English, Español, 简体中文, Français, Deutsch, 日本語, Português, Русский, 한국어, Italiano, العربية.

    How
    Same path: gear icon or File menu → settings → Language row.
    Tips
    If your Windows display language matches a supported locale, mappy may start in it automatically.
  • Arabic right-to-left ᕙ(⇀‸↼)ᕗ العربية mirrors the layout — menus and docks flow right-to-left while map navigation stays … UnfoldFold

    العربية mirrors the layout — menus and docks flow right-to-left while map navigation stays familiar.

    How
    Select العربية in Language settings → Save.
    Tips
    World lore may still be English or pack-localized; only menus and docks flip direction.
  • World i18n per pack (╯°□°)╯ Official Map Packs may ship translated marker titles and lore alongside the base language. UnfoldFold

    Official Map Packs may ship translated marker titles and lore alongside the base language.

    How
    Install the pack; read markers in whatever languages the publisher included.
    Tips
    UI language and world language are independent — mix and match if the pack allows.
⚖

7Privacy and trustd(^-^)♪

No account, no telemetry — your vault stays on the PC you trust.

Headline instrument

Local-only data

(◕‿◕✿)
What it is
Progress, drawings, and prefs live in localStorage and IndexedDB on your machine.
How to use it
Just play — nothing uploads automatically.
Tips
Export when you want a file elsewhere.

    Shipping Windows builds include modest hardening against casual devtools access — a guardrail for players, not a lock on your files.

Privacy you can explain at the table(≧▽≦)

mappy is free for you to use. Official Map Pack world data belongs to its publishers — the app is the table you set the map on.

  • No account Launch and play with no sign-in or cloud save from us.
  • No product telemetry No analytics SDK ships in the desktop build.
  • Local vault Progress and prefs live on your PC; export .mappy when you want a copy elsewhere.
  • Eleven UI languages Menus and docks localize; map lore may follow each Official Map Pack separately.
